summary: Iteration 74 - Frontend testing of 'Boissons vs Autres produits' category toggle in Stock Mouvements tab. All 11 test cases passed. The new 3-button toggle (Tout/Boissons/Autres produits) correctly filters movements based on unit type (bouteille/brique/canette/litre/cl) and beverage keywords.

issues: Minor React hydration warnings: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' - This is a React internal warning from the preview environment that doesn't affect functionality

critical_code_review_comments: Frontend: StockPage.jsx correctly implements the 3-button category toggle at line ~2549
Frontend: isBeverage() classification function at line ~2411 uses BEVERAGE_UNITS Set and BEVERAGE_KEYWORDS regex
Frontend: Counts correctly add up: Boissons (16) + Autres (164) = Tout (180)
Frontend: Banner 'Historique restaurant · X ligne(s) affichée(s)' updates correctly with filtered count
Frontend: Button styling correct - Boissons=orange (bg-orange-600), Autres=emerald (bg-emerald-600), Tout=slate (bg-slate-700)
Frontend: Date sorting DESC maintained across all category views
Frontend: Auto-refresh indicator shows '60s' interval and last sync time
Frontend: Classification explanation text visible: 'Classification automatique par unité (bouteille/brique/canette/litre/cl) et mots-clés'
seed_data_creation: Pre-existing data used: 183 movements total (180 visible in restaurant view, 3 magasin movements hidden)
